content_head:
你是我的个人信息流分析助理。请基于下方 Cloud Vault browser-capture 材料，
        生成 2026-07-09 的中文 Markdown 日报。

        约束:
        - 只使用材料里出现的信息，不要编造外部事实。
        - 明确区分“事实信息”“原作者观点”“需要验证的问题”。
        - 投资相关内容只做研究观察，不给买卖建议、仓位建议或交易指令。
        - 优先提取对 AI 基建、半导体/PCB/光通信、工具链、市场情绪、个人效率有用的信号。
        - 对低信噪比、重复、鸡汤、缺少来源的内容要直接降权。
        - 输出要适合 Telegram 阅读：重点清晰，避免长篇复述。

        建议结构:
        # Cloud Vault 每日信息流 - 2026-07-09

        ## 2. 高价值主题
        ## 3. 关键观察
        ## 4. 低信噪比/待降权

        ### 1. At ECTC, GUC showed a practical STCO flow for CoWoS-R style UCIe-A integration, ...
                - 时间: 2026-07-09 07:45
                - 来源: x.com / page
                - 作者: SemiAnalysis
                - 标签: none
                - 优先级: normal
                - 去重状态: unique
                - URL: https://x.com/SemiAnalysis_/status/2074971917618938072
                - 本地路径: inbox/browser-capture/2026-07-08/cap_20260708_234542_at-ectc-guc-showed-a-practical-stco-flow-for-cowos_db716c3a.md

                At ECTC, GUC showed a practical STCO flow for CoWoS-R style UCIe-A integration, moving from pre-layout 2D EM exploration to post-layout 3D EM extraction, transient eye simulation, PDN impedance analysis, and final power-aware SI signoff. (1/3)
在 ECTC 上，GUC 展示了针对 CoWoS-R 风格 UCIe-A 集成的实用 STCO 流程，涵盖从预布局 2D 电磁探索到后布局 3D 电磁提取、瞬态眼图仿真、PDN 阻抗分析以及最终功耗感知 SI 签收的完整过程。(1/3) 

---

 The key point is that RDL is not just “wires and polymers.” At 16 to 36 GT/s, the geometry becomes part of the channel. GUC uses GSG-interleaved transmission lines, where ground shielding traces surround the signal lines to improve isolation and help skew compensation. The
 关键在于，RDL 不仅仅是“导线和聚合物”。在 16 至 36 GT/s 的速率下，几何结构成为通道的一部分。GUC 采用 GSG 交错传输线，接地屏蔽走线环绕信号线，以改善隔离并帮助进行偏移补偿。

---

 The challenge is co-optimizing SI and PI at the same time. Line width, spacing, ground placement, via location, PDN plane shape, and routing density all move insertion loss, return loss, crosstalk, impedance peaks, and power noise.

Check out our newsletter on ECTC 2026

---

You really have to applaud Intel’s patent attorneys. 

As a former patent examiner myself I can tell you that it’s no easy feat to write an application that hides all the juicy stuff while still protecting your IP. Filing this the day after Christmas so that it releases the

---

In this week, an Intel patent application was published, revealing its proposed Cross-Batch Memory (XBM), an ultra high-bandwidth memory that offers some significant improvements over the current standard, which could be a direct competitor to HBM4 in the near future.

---

Morgan Stanley noted in its report that competition from Intel’s EMIB could push TSMC to accelerate CoPoS adoption to 2028, potentially with Feynman.

1h
Citi just sent out a note on Nvidia.

Citi spoke with Nvidia's investor relations team, here's what they learned: 

-When asked about Kyber Rubin Ultra delay, Nvidia stated its roadmap is "fully intact" and the NVLink domains they showed at Computex "have not changed either."

-Nvidia reiterated CPO for scale-out is in production. Nvidia will give more details on adoption later this year. Customer adoption for CPO scale-out is "high"

-Customers can choose NVLink with CPO or copper beginning in CY2028 with Feynman

-Nvidia continues to see "very strong demand"
花旗刚刚发布了一份关于英伟达的简报。

花旗与英伟达的投资者关系团队进行了沟通，以下是他们了解到的情况：

- 当被问及 Kyber Rubin Ultra 的延迟问题时，英伟达表示其路线图“完全 intact”，并且他们在 Computex 上展示的 NVLink 域“也没有改变”。

- 英伟达重申，用于横向扩展（scale-out）的 CPO（共封装光学）已进入生产阶段。今年晚些时候，英伟达将提供更多关于采用情况的细节。客户对 CPO 横向扩展的采用率“很高”。

-客户从 CY2028 年起可通过 Feynman 选择采用 CPO 或铜缆的 NVLink

-英伟达继续看到“非常强劲的需求”
